projectDescription: A SOC training platform that lets security teams author investigation exercises, run them against live SIEMs, track analyst progress, and monitor platform health.
keyFeatures: Exercise authoring with ordered investigation steps, MITRE tags, difficulty, and multi-section LEEF/ECS archives
Multi-format archive ingestion: ZIP/tar.gz upload, pasted text, direct .txt/.log files, or live TCP intake via SyslogCanon
Analyst workspace with step-by-step artifact submission, investigation notebooks, and completion tracking
Learning paths with sequential unlock logic, progress tracking, and curated/onboarding flags
Noise log dispatcher that ships scheduled LEEF events to Splunk, QRadar, or Elasticsearch via pg_cron
SIEM integrations: Splunk HEC, syslog TCP (RFC3164/RFC5424), and Elastic bulk indexing with ECS document support
Capability-based role system with admin/analyst system roles and custom permission roles
End-to-end encrypted direct messages (AES-256-GCM) with real-time delivery via Supabase Realtime
Live presence tracking showing who is online and what they are working on
Leaderboard with ranked points and exercise completions
Icinga 2 platform health monitoring with real-time SSE bridge and per-service issue drill-down
Email/password and Microsoft Entra ID (OIDC/OAuth) sign-in
publicApiSurface: POST /api/sessions/start — ship a signed archive to a SIEM destination
DELETE /api/sessions — wipe one or more SIEM indexes and re-fire noise jobs
POST /api/noise/run — execute a scheduled or manual noise job dispatch
GET /api/platform-status/events — SSE stream of Icinga platform health events
GET /api/health — unauthenticated health check returning { ok: true }
requireCapability(capability) — server-side capability gate for server actions
getUserRoles(userId) — fetch all roles assigned to a user
getUserCapabilities(userId) — compute the union capability set for a user
deriveProgress(items) — compute learning-path completion percentage and next unlocked item
computeStreak(completedAts, now) — calculate consecutive-day completion streak
buildRecentActivity(completions, sessions) — merge and deduplicate activity feed
pickQuickStart(activeExercises, completions, sessions) — suggest up to 4 unstarted exercises
validateArchive(file) — streaming archive validation with zip-bomb defense
detectFormat(archiveEntries) — classify LEEF vs raw from first 200 log lines
buildZip(pastedFiles) — pack pasted text files into an in-memory ZIP
